title: Foreign investors have dumped billions of dollars of Korean stocks this year despite record rally. Here's why
summary_full: The selling intensified Monday as the benchmark Kospi plunged more than 8% at the open, even as it emerged as one of the world's standout performers thus far.
summary_public: The selling intensified Monday as the benchmark Kospi plunged more than 8% at the open, even as it emerged as one of the world's standout performers thus far.
